summary: Iteration 5 polish round verified end-to-end. Backend: all 3 new tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration5.py pass — /api/feed and /api/users/{uid}/posts now return `recent_comments` (up to 3 newest, chronological, with author + is_mine). Full pytest suite: 80 passed, 3 skipped, 5 pre-existing seed-dependent failures unchanged from iter-3/iter-4 (test_api.py TestDiscoveryAndLikes + test_new_features test_post_with_mp4_via_media — carry-over per agent note). Frontend: Playwright signup -> /feed -> create post -> add 4 comments -> collapse -> verifies preview shows last 3 chronologically with a 'View all 4 comments' link; re-expanding the thread hides the inline preview (no double render); a 5th comment submitted from the inline form bumps preview to ['three','four','five']. Welcome banner (data-testid=feed-welcome-banner) and invite banner (data-testid=discovery-invite-banner) both render with the exact upgrade / share copy, dismiss via ✕, persist via localStorage keys ace_welcome_v2_dismissed + ace_invite_friends_dismissed, and remain hidden after full page reload. Discovery radius bar regression-clean (50mi chip click still works).
action_items: (Carry-over from iter 3/4) 5 seed-dependent tests in test_api.py and test_new_features.py still fail in the full suite — they assume seed-sarah/jessica/amanda exist in Mongo. Either re-enable seed_demo_users behind a DEV env flag or rewrite those tests to seed their own fixtures. Not a regression; explicitly out of scope per the iteration-5 request.
critical_code_review_comments: PostInteractions.jsx: `count` state is initialised from post.comment_count and only refreshed when the user opens the comments drawer (`setCount(res.data.length)`). On a fresh feed render, the 'View all N comments' button reads `count` (from props) and the preview reads from `post.recent_comments` — they agree. After a new comment is appended via submitComment() the count is incremented by 1, so the 'View all N' label updates correctly. Looks correct overall.

PostInteractions.jsx submitComment(): when the user posts a comment WITHOUT the thread being open (currently impossible since the form lives inside the expanded section, but architecturally), the optimistic preview update (`setPreview(prev => [...prev, res.data].slice(-3))`) would only show 3. That's fine; matches the contract.

DismissibleBanner.jsx: initial state defaults to `hidden=true` and the effect flips it on mount based on localStorage. This produces a one-frame flicker where the banner is missing on first paint then appears — usually unnoticeable but worth knowing. A safer pattern is to lazy-init from localStorage in useState's initializer (avoids the useEffect roundtrip).

posts_router._attach_recent_comments() (per file_of_reference description — not re-read this iter): uses a single aggregation per page which is the right call; just make sure it short-circuits when the page is empty so we don't issue an aggregate with $in:[].

success_rate.backend: 100% on iteration-5 features (3/3 in test_iteration5). Full suite: 80 passed, 3 skipped, 5 pre-existing seed-dependent failures unchanged from prior iterations.
success_rate.frontend: 100% on iteration-5 features (welcome banner, invite banner, comment preview rendering, chronological ordering, 3-cap, View-all link, hide-while-thread-open, inline submit propagation, localStorage persistence across reload). Discovery radius regression clean.

test_credentials: Signed up TEST_ui5_<random>@example.com via the UI signup form (name=I5 Tester, age=30, demo1234). Same Firebase Identity Toolkit pattern as iter-4. Account left in Mongo (no UI delete path).
seed_data_creation: None. Comment preview tests create their own posts + comments per test run; banners use localStorage on the browser side only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 backend tests: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration5.py (3 tests). Run only iter-5: `python -m pytest backend/tests/test_iteration5.py -v`. Full regression: `python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v` — expect 80 passed + 5 pre-existing failures (TestDiscoveryAndLikes seed-dependent + test_post_with_mp4_via_media). For UI testing: signup form requires name, email, age, password, confirm-password (data-testids signup-name-input, signup-email-input, signup-age-input, signup-password-input, signup-confirm-password-input, signup-submit-btn). New iteration-5 selectors: data-testid=feed-welcome-banner (+ -dismiss), data-testid=discovery-invite-banner (+ -dismiss), data-testid=comments-preview-{postId}, comment-preview-{commentId}, comments-view-more-{postId}. Banner localStorage keys: ace_welcome_v2_dismissed, ace_invite_friends_dismissed — clear via DevTools to re-show. Preview hides while the thread is open (no double render). Inline comment submit propagates into the capped-3 preview chronologically.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All iteration-5 features (recent_comments backend field, comment preview UI, dismissible banners with localStorage persistence) work exactly per spec. The 5 carry-over failures remain pre-existing and explicitly out of scope.
